blocks.text: PDF/A-3b (ISO 19005-3) extends PDF/A-2b by allowing arbitrary file attachments to be embedded in the PDF. This makes it ideal for machine-readable invoices, e-signature packages, and hybrid document workflows.

items: Arbitrary file format attachments allowed (XML, JSON, CSV, ZIP, …)
Widely used for ZUGFeRD and Factur-X e-invoicing
Accepted by EU electronic invoicing regulations
A (Accessible): Tagged PDF, full accessibility — Documents read by assistive technology
B (Basic): Minimal visual reproduction — Archival of existing PDFs
U (Unicode): All text has Unicode equivalents — Text extraction and search
